query: SELECT address FROM establishments WHERE address REGEXP '[A-Z][a-z]*\\.' AND address NOT LIKE '%São Paulo%' AND address NOT LIKE '%, Brasil' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT address FROM establishments WHERE address REGEXP '[A-Z][a-z]*\\.' AND address NOT LIKE '%São Paulo%' AND address NOT LIKE '%, Brasil' LIMIT 10;
